problems.diagnostic: autopilot_soft (identifier) is not a package or a property set visible or existing
problems.cause: Reference to undefined package or property set in AGREE annex
problems.minimal_edit: Remove or replace reference to undefined identifier 'autopilot_soft' in the AGREE annex

executor_steps: Identify the AGREE annex block in Nav_Stab_Control_Proc component type
Locate any reference to 'autopilot_soft' within the annex content
Remove the invalid reference to 'autopilot_soft' from the assume statement
Ensure the remaining assume statement only references visible identifiers
